title: Bridge Expansion Joint Thermal Displacement Anomaly Monitor
description: Measures bridge expansion joint gap displacement with an LVDT sensor while simultaneously monitoring deck temperature with DS18B20 probes, predicts expected gap via the thermal expansion model, flags anomalies where actual gap deviates >3 mm from prediction (indicating bearing seizure or hidden restraint), and logs daily trend data to SD — differentiated from vibration damper projects by targeting thermal-mechanical joint health rather than dynamic response.
objective: Detect expansion joint anomalies (measured vs. predicted gap deviation >3 mm) with daily SD logging and relay alert output; seasonal trend analysis of bearing condition.
constraints: Arduino Uno, ±10 mm LVDT with conditioner, two DS18B20 sensors (top/bottom flange), relay for SMS modem, SD card; 20 m steel girder span (α=12e-6/°C); solar powered.
supporting_fact_titles: Linear Thermal Expansion of Structural Metals in Civil Applications
design_element_titles: LVDT Displacement Transducer with DC Conditioner
Cascaded PID Rate and Attitude Controller

element_usage_notes.LVDT Displacement Transducer with DC Con: Directly measures actual joint gap displacement in mm with 0.01 mm resolution.
element_usage_notes.DS18B20 1-Wire Temperature Probe Array: Top and bottom flange temperatures averaged for representative deck thermal state; T_ref=installation temperature.
element_usage_notes.Buzzer and LED Fault Annunciator: Alerts when measured gap deviates >3 mm from thermal model (bearing fault indicator).
element_usage_notes.Cascaded PID Rate and Attitude Controlle: Rate-of-change monitor: inner loop tracks gap velocity; outer loop flags anomalous rate events beyond seasonal model.

element_interactions.to: LVDT Displacement Transducer with DC Conditioner
element_interactions.description: Deck temperature used to compute predicted expansion gap for comparison with LVDT measurement.

element_interactions.from: LVDT Displacement Transducer with DC Conditioner
element_interactions.to: Cascaded PID Rate and Attitude Controller
element_interactions.description: Actual gap fed to rate monitor to detect sudden bearing release or lock events.

element_interactions.from: Cascaded PID Rate and Attitude Controller
element_interactions.description: Deviation >3 mm from thermal model triggers alarm and relay output.
